mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTR(MNO, -3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM MEMBER WHERE SUBSTR(MNO, 2, 8) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER (MNO, MNAME, MID, MPW, MBIRTH, MPHONE, MMAIL, MINSERTDATE, MUPDATEDATE, MDELETEYN) VALUES (#{mno}, #{mname}, #{mid}, #{mpw}, #{mbirth}, #{mphone}, #{mmail}, NOW(), NOW(), 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM MEMBER WHERE MID = #{mid} AND MDELETEYN = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM MEMBER WHERE MID = #{mid} AND MDELETEYN != 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET MDELETEYN = 'N', MUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE MNO = #{mno}
UPDATE MEMBER SET MNAME = #{mname}, MBIRTH = #{mbirth}, MPHONE = #{mphone}, MMAIL = #{mmail}, MUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE MNO = #{mno}
mapper.select:
SELECT MNO, MNAME, MID, MBIRTH, MPHONE, MINSERTDATE FROM MEMBER WHERE MDELETEYN != 'N'
ORDER BY MINSERTDATE ASC, MNAME DESC LIMIT #{offset},#{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE MDELETEYN != 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET MPW = #{mpw}, MUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE MID = #{mid}
UPDATE MEMBER SET MDELETEYN = 'S' WHERE MNO = #{mno}
